Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/3.text: Khu 1. 17 piṭṭhe Dhammapade. 2. Gahapati (Ka), Ma 2. 217 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/5.text: Aṁ 1. 565 piṭṭhe. 2. Saṁ 2. 12, 302; Saṁ 3. 363; Khu 10. 50; Khu 11. 38 piṭṭhesu.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/14.text: Visuddhi 1. 261; Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 353; Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 252; Vi-Ṭṭha 2. 12; Paṭisaṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 88 piṭṭhesu.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/18.text: Upasañciyanti ca, (Syā), upasaṁvaranti ca upaseviyanti ca (Ka)
Sādhyo asādheyyo ca (Syā), yāpyo ayāpyo ca (Ka)

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/56.text: Vi 2. 175; Ma 1. 182; Ma 2. 27 piṭṭhādīsu. 4. Pīḷa (Syā, Ka)

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/59.text: Dī 1. 7; Ma 2. 181; Saṁ 3. 368; Aṁ 3. 358; Vi 2. 213 piṭṭhādīsu.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/90.text: Abhi 1. 46-7 piṭṭhesu. 2. Sannisinna (Sī) 3. Abhi 1. 47 piṭṭhe. 4. Dī 3. 184 piṭṭhe.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/125.text: Samaṅgīti asamaṅgithā (Sī, Syā), samaṅgīti na samaṅgitā asamaṅgitā (Ka)

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/144.text: Dī 3. 198; Ma 1. 145; Aṁ 2. 217; Aṁ 3. 253; Abhi 2. 391 piṭṭhesu.
Na paccāgami (Syā) Itivuttaka-Ṭṭha 10; Sārattha-Ṭī 1. 319 piṭṭhesu passitabbaṁ.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/147.text: Atthasampannaṁ uttānādhippāye sati (Syā), attasampannataṁ. Uttānādhippāye sati (Ka)

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/222.text: Dhammādhikaraṇampi vā (Sī, Syā), Sārattha-Ṭī 2. 206 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/223.text: Dhammādhikaraṇampi vā (Sī, Syā), Sārattha-Ṭī 2. 206 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/240.text: Ādhunika-aṭṭhakathāpotthake “puggalabhedo jānitabbo”tipāṭho, ṭīkāya na sameti. “Puggaladosā jānitabbā”ti porāṇapotthakesu pāṭho, soyeva yutto.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/262.text: Dī 2. 34; Ma 1. 266; Ma 2. 293; Saṁ 1. 140; Vi 3. 10 piṭṭhesu.
Ma 1. 99; Saṁ 1. 266; Aṁ 1. 315; Aṁ 2. 8; Khu 9. 356 piṭṭhādīsu.

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/265.text: Sabhāvassa sabhāvena vā (Sī), sabhāgassa sabhāvena vā (Syā)

Visuddhimaggamahāṭīkā/X/X/287.text: Dī 2. 60; Saṁ 1. 413 piṭṭhādīsu. 2. Abhi 2. 272, 273 piṭṭhesu. 3. Abhi 2. 274 piṭṭhe.
